title: astronia williamsii var. ramosii
intro: Astronia williamsii var. ramosii, also known as Ramos' Astronia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, native to the Philippines. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ramos' Astronia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant is traditionally prepared by making tea or infusions from its leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
